description_long: This figure depicts an adult pedestrian in a highly dynamic pose, with both arms extended outward and holding long, thin poles, suggesting a martial arts or acrobatic movement. The body is elongated and stylized, with exaggerated limbs and a compact torso, giving the impression of motion and agility. The head is small and round, with a stern facial expression and a tightly pulled-back hairstyle. The clothing appears to be a fitted top and loose, flowing pants, with the lower garment flaring out dramatically around the hips and thighs. The legs are bent, with one foot firmly planted and the other raised, as if in mid-kick or leap. The overall form is abstracted, with visible distortions and painterly textures, emphasizing movement over anatomical realism.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian in a dynamic, martial arts-inspired pose, holding long poles and wearing loose, flowing clothing. The figure is elongated and abstract, with exaggerated limbs and a compact torso.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, extended arms holding poles, and the dramatic flare of the lower garment.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated limbs, bent leg, and the dynamic extension of the poles.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back, the compact torso, and the sweeping motion of the arms and poles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the raised leg, the pulled-back hairstyle, and the angular posture.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted top and loose, flared pants in a stylized, martial arts-inspired design
attribute_posture: dynamic, mid-action pose with arms extended and one leg raised
